summary: Core Rx.NET abstractions: IObservable<T>, IObserver<T>, observable factories, operators, schedulers, subjects, and .NET integration points.
recommendedPatterns: Compose asynchronous and event-based logic with IObservable<T> and operators rather than ad hoc callbacks.
Keep observable pipelines declarative and isolate side effects near subscription boundaries.
Use operators, schedulers, and disposal together as one design unit.
avoidPatterns: Do not scatter Subscribe calls throughout business logic without ownership.
Do not hide terminal behavior and errors from downstream consumers.
setupSteps: Define source observables and subscription ownership early.
commonPitfalls: Treating every event callback as a separate special case instead of composing operators.
